rulings.Case Title: PAUL WILEY VS. ADAM BRISTOL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed Oct-11-2013
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 06, 2013, line 1. RESPONDENT JOSEPH BURKE, ADAM BRISTOL, INDRE VISKONTAS Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Filed Oct-11-2013. DENIED. No tentative ruling denying Petition to Compel Arbitration has been in effect on October 11, 2013. On September 23, 2013 judge Dorfman specifically stated that due to the fact that petitioner was not served with the opposition papers in time to prepare for argument judge Dorfman was "not prepared to come to a final decision" and "was not prepared to go forward" with the hearing. Respondent's argument that Petitioner was deprived of its right to dismiss the action would render the continuance of the hearing a hollow gesture and a mockery of due process. Respondent does not cite any authority for the proposition that trial in this case was commenced with filing of an Amended Petition to Compel Arbitration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 06, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A. Notice Of Motion For Protective Order. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: (1) Plaintiff shall limit its requests regarding securitization to 2 requests for production. Plaintiff may re-draft such requests or choose from existing requests ##32-56. Plaintiff shall serve such requests on Defendant no later than November 18, 2013 Defendant shall respond no later than December 16, 2013; (2) Defendant shall respond only to request #94 from the group ##94-111 no later than December 16, 2013; (3) Defendant shall respond only to request ##119, 130, 133 from the group ##115-134 no later than December 16, 2013; (4) Plaintiff shall limit its requests regarding inspections to 10 requests for production. Plaintiff may re-draft such requests or choose from existing requests ##135-159. Plaintiff shall serve such requests on Defendant no later than November 18, 2013 Defendant shall respond no later than December 16, 2013; (5) Plaintiff shall limit its requests regarding broker price opinions to 3 requests for production. Plaintiff may re-draft such requests or choose from existing requests ##161-172. Plaintiff shall serve such requests on Defendant no later than November 18, 2013 Defendant shall respond no later than December 16, 2013; (6) Defendant shall respond only to requests ##173, 182, 183 from the group ##173-190 no later than December 16, 2013. This ruling is not intended to limit any potential reasonable and necessary follow up requests, e.g. Request for Production Set Two. = (501/REQ)
